frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate grasp technique, object securely held

Right grasper placing first object on right peg

All objects transferred to right side, now beginning reverse direction with right grasper pickup

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining smooth transfer technique in reverse direction

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all phases and completion. Task performed efficiently with expert-level timing. No penalties observed throughout the performance.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with completion time of 34 seconds, well within expert benchmark (40-60s). Smooth execution with no dropped objects or penalties.
strengths: Excellent completion time at expert level
